svg.title: Accessible Navigation Problem Breakdown
svg.desc: Three-pillar breakdown of the accessible navigation hackathon problem: audio cues, hazard detection, and crowd-sourced accessibility data
svg.text: Accessible navigation — what the problem is really asking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who are the target users for accessible navigation?')
sendPrompt('What does the core navigation system need to do?')
sendPrompt('How do audio cues work in navigation for visually impaired users?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of hazards should the navigation system detect?')
sendPrompt('How does crowd-sourced accessibility data work?')
sendPrompt('What is the expected real-world impact of this accessible navigation system?')
